title: matelea brevistipitata
intro: Matelea brevistipitata is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the dogbane family. This plant is native to Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Matelea brevistitipata include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to relieve pain and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Matelea brevistipitata include reducing fever, treating wounds, and promoting digestive health, and it can be prepared in various herbal forms such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
